## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on desktop (1024px+)
- [ ] Tested on tablet (768px)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (375px)
- [ ] Keyboard navigation verified
- [ ] Screen reader tested (NVDA/VoiceOver)
- [ ] Lighthouse score maintained (90+ all categories)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows Kindonar coding standards
- [ ] Types are complete and correct
- [ ] No hardcoded tokens (uses CSS custom properties)
- [ ] Accessibility attributes added (ARIA, alt text, focus)
- [ ] Responsive behavior verified
- [ ] Reduced motion respected
- [ ] Loading/error/empty states handled
- [ ] Documentation updated
